raw_title: Journalistic Epistemic Authority in the Age of AI: The Incorporation of Generative AI in Newsrooms
title_en: Journalistic Epistemic Authority in the Age of AI: The Incorporation of Generative AI in Newsrooms
title_zh: 人工智能时代的新闻认知权威：生成式人工智能在新闻编辑室的融入
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了在人工智能时代，新闻编辑室如何融入生成式人工智能技术，以及这如何影响新闻行业的权威性和可信度。研究关注新闻工作者如何在使用AI工具时保持专业判断，以及公众对AI生成新闻的信任问题。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how newsrooms incorporate generative AI technology in the age of artificial intelligence, and how this affects the authority and credibility of journalism. The study focuses on how journalists maintain professional judgment when using AI tools, and public trust in AI-generated news.
research_direction_zh: 探索人工智能技术对新闻行业专业实践、认知权威和公众信任的影响，特别是生成式AI在新闻生产中的整合与挑战。
research_direction_en: Investigating the impact of AI technology on professional practices, epistemic authority, and public trust in journalism, particularly the integration and challenges of generative AI in news production.
